examples: The mother said nothing, but gave him a large dish of black pudding, and Marleen still wept without ceasing.
The reason of the law ceasing, the law itself ceases.
The only thing that will stop inflation is ceasing to expand the money supply.
The iconic film manufacturer is ceasing production of its digital cameras and other digital products.
According to an anonymous source at Ars Technica, long-running Nintendo Power Magazine is ceasing publication.
